reason: The confluence of negative news, including high-profile regulatory FUD (Boris Johnson), confirmed institutional hesitancy (tokenized stocks), selling pressure from a major foundation (Ethereum Foundation), and broader geopolitical risks impacting brand visibility (F1 sponsorship), indicates a period of significant uncertainty and potential downward pressure. This suggests smart money may be offloading positions, leading to a distribution phase.
